evals.name: ambiguous-beads-notebook
evals.prompt: ask my beads notebook how dependency edges actually work
evals.expected_output: Identifies beads-related notebook(s), handles the ambiguity of 2 beads notebooks (either asks user or picks most-sources/most-recent), runs nlm generate-chat, returns grounded answer preserving [N] citations verbatim.

evals.name: topic-without-notebook-word
evals.prompt: what do my sources say about Gilbert syndrome and cardiovascular risk?
evals.expected_output: Triggers the skill despite no 'notebook' keyword, matches Gilbert syndrome notebook by topic, runs generate-chat, returns grounded answer with [N] citations preserved.

evals.name: mcp-with-citation-followthrough
evals.prompt: pull from my notes on MCP — what transport options does the model context protocol support? tell me which source each point comes from
evals.expected_output: Matches MCP notebook (Mastering the Model Context Protocol), runs generate-chat, preserves [N] citations, AND runs nlm sources to resolve citations since user asked for source attribution.
